items.desc: Used for crafting. One of the most basic parts.
Used for crafting. One of the most basic parts.
Used for crafting. Primarily used to build Power Lines.
Used for crafting. A sturdier and more durable Iron Plate.
Used for crafting. One of the most basic parts.
Used for crafting the most basic parts.
Smelted from a combination of Iron Ore and Coal. Can be made into several parts used in building construction.
Absorbs radioactive particles when used with the Hazmat Suit.
Filters out toxins and pollutants from the air when used with a Gas Mask.
A versatile container cast from Aluminum Ingots.
Smelted from Aluminum Scrap, which is refined from Alumina Solution. Used to produce specialized aluminum-based parts.
Used to make products that require high heat conduction or a high specific strength. Thin, lightweight, and highly durable.
Used to dissipate heat faster.
Refined from Alumina. Can be smelted into Aluminum Ingots for industrial usage.
A complex logic machine that is used to control advanced behavior in other machines.
Used for crafting the most basic parts.
Used for crafting. Primarily used for Pipelines due to its high corrosion resistance.
Used for crafting. A multipurpose building block.
A more robust multipurpose frame.
Creates a mechanical force that is used to move things from machines to vehicles.
Used for crafting. The moving parts of a motor.
Primarily used when constructing slightly more advanced buildings.
Primarily used when constructing slightly more advanced buildings.
Simultaneously utilizes the compressive strength of concrete and the tensile strength of steel. Mostly used as a stable base for constructing buildings.
Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.
Ionized Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.
Rocket Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.
Turbofuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.
Used for building. Good for stable Foundations.
Used for crafting. One of the most basic parts.
Project Part #1. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.
Project Part #2. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.
Project Part #3. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.
Project Part #4. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.
Project Part #5. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

Project Part #7. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.  These modular generators use superconducting magnets and vast amounts of electricity to produce a powerful and eas…

Project Part #6. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.  This extremely fast and precise computing system is specifically designed to direct the Project Assembly: Assembly…
Project Part #8. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.  Uses extreme heat to produce the high-pressure plasma required to get Project Assembly into motion.

Project Part #9. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Power Usage: 500-1500 MW (1000 MW average).  Nuclear Pasta is extremely dense degenerate matter, formed when extrem…

Project Part #11. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.  A large amount of force is required for the Warp Drives to activate, so sticking them to rockets was the logical…
Project Part #12. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Power Usage: 0-2000 MW (1000 MW average).  Growth is the metric by which we measure success.

Project Part #10. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.  Years ahead of the competition, this top-of-the-line 3D printer is used for the production of synthetic biologica…
Derived from Raw Quartz. Commonly used to create glass structures, in advanced refinement processes, and for alternative production of electronics.
Can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.
Versatile and easy to manufacture, this material has a wide range of uses.
Advanced electronics that have a plethora of different uses.
A very flexible material that has a lot of friction.
A by-product of Crude Oil refinement into Fuel. Commonly used to manufacture Plastic and Rubber.
A by-product of Plastic and Rubber production. Can be further refined into Fuel and Petroleum Coke.
Used for crafting. A carbon-rich material distilled from Heavy Oil Residue.  Used as a less efficient Coal replacement.
Caterium's high conductivity and resistance to corrosion make it ideal for small, advanced electronics.
Connects multiple cables and wires in a very efficient way. Uses a standard pattern, so it has many varied applications.
The by-product of consuming Uranium Fuel Rods in a Nuclear Power Plant. Non-Fissile Uranium can be extracted. Handle with caution.  Caution: HIGHLY Radioactive.
The by-product of consuming Plutonium Fuel Rods in a Nuclear Power Plant. Must be stored in a safe location. Handle with caution.  Caution: EXTREMELY Radioactive.
Keeps advanced parts and buildings from exceeding efficient temperature levels.
An electronic oscillator circuit that uses the mechanical resonance of a vibrating crystal to create an electrical signal with a precise frequency.
Regulates power output via electromagnetism.
A corrosion-resistant, nitride-hardened, highly-robust-yet-lightweight modular frame.
A more complex and powerful version of the regular Motor.
Derived from Raw Quartz. Used in the production of advanced radar technology and high-quality display screens.
Used for crafting. The static parts of a motor.
A strange slug radiating an unknown weak power.
A strange slug radiating an unknown power.
A strange slug radiating a powerful unknown power.
Primarily used as fuel for Drones and vehicles.
Smelted from Caterium Ore. Primarily used for advanced electronics.
Controls AIs and keeps them from evolving in malicious ways. Super advanced electronics.
Produced when Nitrogen Gas reacts with Water. Its high corrosiveness and oxidizing properties make it an excellent choice for refinement and fuel production processes.
Produced by combining Sulfur and Water in a complex reaction. Primarily used in refinement processes and Battery production.
An explosive powder that is commonly used to produce simple explosives.
Plutonium Pellets encased in concrete. Used to produce Plutonium Fuel Rods for Nuclear Power production.  Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average). ﻿Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

Produced in the Particle Accelerator through conversion of Non-fissile Uranium. Used to produce Encased Plutonium Cells for Plutonium Fuel Rods.  Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average). Caution: Mod…
Enhances and directs radio signals.
Converts outgoing force into internal pressure. Required to contain unstable, high-energy matter.
Used to package gases and volatile liquids for transportation.
The Uranium-238 isotope is non-fissile, meaning it cannot be used for nuclear fission. It can, however, be converted into fissile Plutonium in the Particle Accelerator.  Caution: Mildly Radioactive.
The next-gen version of a Computer.
Ground-up Copper Ingots. The high natural density of Copper, combined with the granularity of the powder, makes this part perfect for producing Nuclear Pasta in the Particle Accelerator.

Time Crystals are Diamonds that have been reconfigured on a sub-atomic level in the Converter to retain a time-periodic self-organizing structure. This allows them to be used in the development of qua…
Synthetic Diamonds produced by exposing Coal to extreme heat and pressure.  Used in the production of Time Crystals and Dark Matter Crystals.  Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average).

The SAM Fluctuator is able to regulate and direct the behavior of Reanimated SAM through the application of electric charges with varying frequencies. This control facilitates technologies such as mat…

The active and contained form of the Strange Alien Matter.  Proper electromagnetic containment is required, as it appears to be able to manipulate the atomic bonds of any matter it comes into contact…
Produced by reconstructing other metals on a molecular level using Strange Alien Matter.  Synthesized by FICSIT to be the perfect construction material, and used in the most high-end processes.
The Ficsite Trigon, made from Ficsite Ingots, is perfectly shaped for all construction challenges. Its performance is so exceptional, it basically solved structural engineering.

Produced as a by-product of Quantum Encoding processes and alternatively generated in the Converter.  Various fields of science are still debating the nature and properties of Dark Matter. Meanwhile,…

Excited Photonic Matter is essential for all production processes in the Quantum Encoder.  Formed in the Converter by inducing intense photon interactions through exposure to SAM in a high-energy envi…

Concentrated Dark Matter Residue that is isolated within a crystalline vessel. This form of containment allows for utilising Dark Matter reliably in other production processes.  Power Usage: 500-1500…

An oscillator circuit that uses the mechanical resonance of a vibrating crystal to create a string vibration with a precise frequency. Often used in teleportation technology and dimensional manipulati…

The Neural-Quantum Processor utilizes a combination of neural network architecture and quantum computing techniques to achieve unprecedented performance. This technology has enabled some of FICSIT's b…
A high-impulse compressed gas fuel. Can be used as-is to power Fuel-Powered Generators, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.
A more efficient alternative to Fuel. Can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles.
A much more efficient alternative to Coal. Used as fuel for vehicles and Coal-Powered Generators.
Fuel that has been ionized, allowing it to deliver incredible output. Can be used as-is to power Fuel-Powered Generators, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.
Used to produce Uranium Fuel Rods for Nuclear Power production. Made from Uranium Ore.  Caution: Mildly Radioactive.
Dissolved Alumina, extracted from Bauxite. Can be further refined into Aluminum Scrap for Aluminum Ingot production.
Used to package fluids for transportation.
Crude Oil, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles.
Heavy Oil Residue, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles.
Water, packaged for alternative transport.
An explosive powder that is commonly used to produce modern firearms.
Ground-up Alien Remains in a neat little package. Used for medical purposes and to research alien organisms.

A symbol of appreciation for all the hard work FICSIT has done for its employees. It seems to have an aura of gratitude. Seeing this also means the seasonal event is nearly done, and we can finally ge…
A collection of FICSMAS ornaments and also an eyesore.
This FICSMAS Tree Branch is very different from regular tree branches: it's used to produce parts and buildings during the FICSMAS event, rather than for combustion.
FICSIT's newest holiday innovation: decorations that can be turned into decorations! Efficiency and waste-conscious design at its best.
FICSMAS Data Cartridge Day 14, used to progress FICSMAS MAM research.

Gifts that have inexplicably fallen from the sky or spawned from a FICSMAS Gift Tree.  Don’t question it—they’re used to produce FICSMAS buildings and parts.  These Gifts are part of the FICSMAS Event…
This Actual Snow is made from several chemical elements and experiences 100% like naturally occuring snow after extensive user testing.
A delicious Candy Cane to be enjoyed during the FICSMAS Holidays. *Disclaimer: Not for human consumption...
A fancy bow. Not for wearing, eating, admiring, Lizard Doggos, humans, aliens, or anything not related to FICSMAS factory production.
FICSMAS Data Cartridge Day 8, used to progress FICSMAS MAM research.
An ornament for making FICSMAS Decorations. An acceptable red.
An ornament for making FICSMAS Decorations. A mildly pleasing blue.
An ornament for making FICSMAS Decorations. A slightly dignified copper.
An ornament for making FICSMAS Decorations. An okay iron.
FICSMAS Data Cartridge Day 4, used to progress FICSMAS MAM research.
FICSMAS Data Cartridge Day 1, used to progress FICSMAS MAM research.
A weird alien phenomenon. While the sphere appears liquid, it behaves like a solid and does not have any detectable mass. It seems to somehow interact with and have awareness of its environment.
Used to break down space and time. Required to power Portals.

Translates organic chemicals into readable alien genetic information. Used for researching alien organisms.  Go the extra kilometer! Knowledge is power, and power is just efficiency with fewer steps.…

Usage and production of this material is strictly prohibited. On Earth, that is. There are no rules in space, only efficiency.   Power Usage: 500-1500 MW (1000 MW average). Caution: Moderately Radioac…
Silica dissolved in Water, produced as part of the alternative refinement of Raw Quartz. The Silica can be extracted from the Water to complete the refinement process.
Used for crafting. The most essential basic resource.
Mainly used as fuel for vehicles & Coal-Powered Generators, or in Steel production.
Used for crafting. A basic resource primarily used for electricity.
Used for crafting. A basic resource primarily used for stable Foundations.
Can be processed into Quartz Crystals and Silica, which both offer a variety of applications.
Refined into all kinds of Oil-based resources, like Fuel and Plastic.
It's water.
Strange Alien Matter, commonly referred to as SAM, doesn't seem to follow the known laws of physics. It whispers of new possibilities.
Has a variety of uses, including metallurgy, cooling, and Nitric Acid production. On MASSAGE-2 (AB)b, it can be extracted from underground gas wells.
Used to produce Alumina, which can be further refined into the Aluminum Scrap required to produce Aluminum Ingots.
Smelted into Caterium Ingots, which are primarily used for advanced electronics.
Primarily used to produce Black Powder.
A radioactive element.  Used to produce Encased Uranium Cells for Uranium Fuel Rods.  Caution: Moderately Radioactive.
A standard issue self-defense electroshock melee weapon.
Scans the area for a selected item. Beeps at a rate proportional to proximity and direction.
An improvised ranged weapon for self-defense. Has to be reloaded after each use.
A long-range, rapid-fire weapon. Specifically designed to deliver adequate performance within the designated work area.
Allows pioneers to breathe normally in toxic gas-filled areas. Consumes Gas Filters from the pioneer's inventory when in use.

Allows pioneers to travel through the air with increased control.  Fuel is automatically consumed from the pioneer's inventory to refill the Jetpack while on the ground. Different fuel types can be us…
A remote-control device used to handle and detonate Nobelisks.
Shields pioneers from the adverse effects of radiation.  Consumes Iodine-Infused Filters from the pioneer's inventory when worn in radioactive areas.
Automatically extracts a resource when placed on a resource node. Note: Has limited storage space.
The one and only FICSIT Factory Cart™. Now with special FICSIT-Foundation-only Grip Wheels, for an even smoother and faster factory floor experience!
The one and only Golden FICSIT Factory Cart™  You have now officially ascended.  Go forth now, Master of Spaghetti, God of the Factory, Sinker of Cups, Employee of the Planet... travel in STYLE!
Clears an area of flora that is too difficult to remove by hand.  Fuel: Biofuel
Self-defense is now not only fun, but also delicious for the target! Do not lick or consume.
An exoskeleton for the lower legs that assists movement, allowing pioneers to sprint faster and jump higher. Also dampens the impact of landing.
Provides faster traversal of factories by allowing pioneers to zip along Power lines. Activate the Zipline and aim at a nearby Power Line to connect to it.

Power Consumption: 100 MW  Allows pioneers to move vertically and hover in mid-air to improve building efficiency and factory traversal. Wirelessly connects to nearby power connections, such as Power…
A heavy self-defense electroshock melee weapon.
The most energy-efficient form of solid Biomass. Can be used as fuel for the Chainsaw.
Primarily used as fuel. Biomass Burners and vehicles can use Wood for power.
Primarily used as fuel. Biomass Burners and vehicles can use Leaves for power.
Liquid Biofuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.
Primarily used as fuel. Biomass Burners and vehicles can use it for power. Biomass is much more energy-efficient than raw biological matter.
The carapace of an alien Hog creature. Used for MAM research.
The remains of a plasma-spitting alien creature. Used for MAM research.
Nitric Acid, packaged for alternative transport.
Nitrogen Gas, packaged for alternative transport.
Alumina Solution, packaged for alternative transport.
Liquid Biofuel can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles.
Used to craft equipment. Flexible but durable fabric.
Used for crafting. Biomass Burners and vehicles can also use Mycelia for power.
The remains of whatever that creepy thing was. Used for MAM research.
The shell-like remains of an alien... thing. Used for MAM research.
Sulfuric Acid, packaged for alternative transport.
Consumable  Eat to restore 1 health segment.
Consumable  Eat to restore half a health segment.
Fully restores health when used.  The FICSIT Medicinal Inhaler can be produced from a variety of different ingredients.
Consumable  Eat to restore 2 health segments.
Slows down your fall when activated in mid-air.
Has the minimum safety requirements.
Keep away from easily distracted pioneers.
Poses acceptable amount of risk to pioneers.
Compressed dihydrogen monoxide crystals for weaponized fun!
Explodes on impact, dealing heavy damage.
Electrocutes the target on impact, stunning it for a short time.  Stun Duration: 5 seconds
Can be shot using the Rebar Gun for self-defense purposes.

The bullet guidance system built into this ammunition allows it to accurately hit any target within the reticle area. Especially useful when dealing with agile threats, or for pioneers who can't be bo…
A simple explosive, useful for clearing boulders, vegetation, and other obstacles.
Detonates into multiple smaller explosions. Practical for clearing out large areas of vegetation and other inconveniences.
Creates a deadly gas cloud instead of a regular explosion.
Uses a nuclear fission reaction to generate a massive explosion. WARNING: Ensure all FICSIT property is clear of the blast zone before detonation.
Generates a powerful shockwave instead of a regular explosion.
Fractures when shot, launching deadly debris with wide spread but limited range.
Lightweight, compact, and volatile. These rounds provide extreme capacity and rate of fire at the cost of accuracy.
Standard issue Rifle ammunition, useful for establishing dominance.
Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants.  Caution: Produces radioactive Uranium Waste when consumed. Caution: Moderately Radioactive.
Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants.  Caution: Produces radioactive Plutonium Waste when consumed. Caution: HIGHLY Radioactive.
Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants. The power source that put FICSIT on the map. Literally. The crater is still there.  Caution: Moderately Radioactive.
Absolutely indestructible. Needs no further introduction.

Transports available input back and forth between its home Port and destination Ports. Drone Status and other details can be viewed at a Drone's home Port. Must be built on a Drone Port.  Has 9 invent…
Traverses rough terrain, including near-vertical surfaces. A fast and nimble exploration vehicle.  Has 12 inventory slots and a built-in Crafting Bench.  Fuel: Any fuel type

Attaches to an Electric Locomotive or other Freight Car to transport resources. Must be built on a Railway. Resources are loaded and unloaded at Freight Platforms. Has a 1600 m³ or 32-slot capacity, d…
Moves Freight Cars from station to station. Requires between 25-110 MW of power to move.  Must be built on a Railway.  Nicknamed 'Leif' by FICSIT pioneers because of its reliability.

Picks up and delivers liquids at Fluid Truck Stations. This process can be automated. Nicknamed 'The Soda Can' by FICSIT pioneers because of its bi-cylindrical frame.  Has a capacity of 3200 m³ for fl…

Picks up and delivers resources at Truck Stations. This process can be automated. Nicknamed 'The Unit' by FICSIT pioneers because of its massive frame.  Has 48 inventory slots and a built-in Crafting…

Picks up and delivers resources at Truck Stations. This process can be automated. Nicknamed 'Sugarcube' by FICSIT pioneers with the justification “It’s pretty sweet, y’know”.  Has 25 inventory slots a…
Power Slug mucus compressed into a solid crystal-like shard.  It radiates a strange power.
An odd alien object with a mind-bending, yet somehow familiar shape. It emits an unsettling energy.

This intricate condensed-matter matrix is used to enhance the output of the Alien Power Augmenter.  Initially developed in efforts to create a human-made Somersloop, the Alien Power Matrix cannot sust…

buildings.desc: Burns various forms of Biomass to generate electricity for the power grid. Has a Conveyor Belt input port that allows the Biomass supply to be automated.  Resource consumption will automatically be lo…

Burns Coal to boil Water. The steam produced rotates turbines that generate electricity for the power grid. Has Conveyor Belt and Pipeline input ports that allow the Coal and Water supply to be automa…

Consumes Fuel to generate electricity for the power grid. Has a Pipeline input port that allows the Fuel supply to be automated.  Caution: Always generates power at the set clock speed. Shuts down if…

Extracts solid resources from the resource node it is built on.  Default extraction rate is 60 resources per minute.  Extraction rate varies based on resource node purity. Outputs all extracted resour…

Extracts Crude Oil when built on an oil node. Extraction rates vary based on node purity.  Default Extraction Rate: 120 m³ of oil per minute. Head Lift: 10 m (Allows fluids to be transported 10 meters…

Extracts solid resources from the resource node it is built on.  Default extraction rate is 120 resources per minute.  Extraction rate varies based on resource node purity. Outputs all extracted resou…

Extracts solid resources from the resource node it is built on.  Default extraction rate is 240 resources per minute.  Extraction rate varies based on resource node purity. Outputs all extracted resou…

Crafts 1 part into another part.  Can be automated by feeding component parts in via a Conveyor Belt connected to the input port. The resulting parts can be automatically extracted by connecting a Con…

Smelts ore into ingots.  Can be automated by feeding ore in via a Conveyor Belt connected to the input port. The resulting ingots can be automatically extracted by connecting a Conveyor Belt to the ou…

Smelts 2 resources into alloy ingots.  Can be automated by feeding ore in via Conveyor Belts connected to the input ports. The resulting ingots can be automatically extracted by connecting a Conveyor…

Refines fluid and/or solid parts into other parts. Head Lift: 10 m (Allows fluids to be transported 10 meters upwards.)  Has both Conveyor Belt and Pipeline input and output ports so that a wide range…

Packages and unpackages fluids. Head Lift: 10 m (Allows fluids to be transported 10 meters upwards.)  Has both Conveyor Belt and Pipeline input and output ports so that a wide range of recipes can be…

Crafts 3 or 4 parts into another part.  Can be automated by feeding component parts in via Conveyor Belts connected to the input ports. The resulting parts can be automatically extracted by connecting…

Crafts 2 parts into another part.  Can be automated by feeding component parts in via Conveyor Belts connected to the input ports. The resulting parts can be automatically extracted by connecting a Co…

Blends fluids together or combines them with solid parts in a wide variety of processes. Head Lift: 10 m (Allows fluids to be transported 10 meters upwards.)  Has both Conveyor Belt and Pipeline input…

Extracts water from the body of water it is built on. Note: the water needs to be sufficiently deep, and rivers are generally not deep enough.  Default Extraction Rate: 120 m³ of water per minute. Hea…

Uses electromagnetic fields to propel particles to very high speeds and energies. The specific design allows for a variety of processes, including matter generation and conversion.  Warning: Power usa…
The Converter harnesses Reanimated SAM to enable precise matter and energy transmutation.  Warning: Power usage is very high and unstable.
The Quantum Encoder uses Excited Photonic Matter to produce the most complex of parts, controlling development up to the quantum level.  Warning: Power usage is extremely high and unstable.

Collects pressurized resources when placed on the activated sub-nodes of a Resource Well. Does not require power.  Default Extraction Rate: 60 m³ of fluid per minute. Head Lift: 10 m (Allows fluids to…

Activates a Resource Well by pressurizing the underground resource. Must be placed on a Resource Well. Once activated, Resource Well Extractors can be placed on the surrounding sub-nodes to extract th…

Consumes Nuclear Fuel Rods and Water to produce electricity for the power grid.  Produces Nuclear Waste, which is extracted via the Conveyor Belt output.  Caution: Always generates power at the set cl…

Harnesses geothermal energy to generate power. Must be built on a Geyser.  Caution: Power production fluctuates.  Power Production: Impure Geyser: 50-150 MW (100 MW average) Normal Geyser: 100-300 MW…
